## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.180 — “Police officer” defined.

“Police officer” means every officer authorized to direct or regulate traffic or to make arrests for violations of traffic laws, ordinances or regulations.

subsections.text: “Police officer” means every officer authorized to direct or regulate traffic or to make arrests for violations of traffic laws, ordinances or regulations.
